excerpt: Oh lots of dubious things going on here as many people have commented the biggest issue is the idea that you can dissolve and retreat in one session is likely to mean that you're going to lose product that was just in place because the half-life of the reversing agent and Lauren …

segments.text: oh lots of dubious things going on here as many people have commented the biggest issue is the idea that you can dissolve and retreat in one session is likely to mean that you're going to lose product that was just in place because the half-life of the reversing agent and Lauren days is at least five hours and so while you're having your new filler put in your reversing agent is taking it back out again so that is the biggest issue here and the rest of it is kind of social media attention grabbing tape stuff that has a lovely visual story about what you might be able to do with fella that probably isn't true the biggest thing about all of this is I think it's driven by this competition that people feel they need to compete with the latest news Trend if you actually want to find out how to compete if you're a medical practitioner and you want to find out how to compete without doing this sort of thing to your patients then click on the link that goes with this or have a look in the link in my bio and I'm doing a free webinar just for medical practitioners where I'm going to explaining just how you should compete in this crazy Marketplace that we have in Medical
Aesthetics the right way to get you quality patient to stay with you for many years so click on the link in my bio and I'll see you there

transcript: oh lots of dubious things going on here as many people have commented the biggest issue is the idea that you can dissolve and retreat in one session is likely to mean that you're going to lose product that was just in place because the half-life of the reversing agent and Lauren days is at least five hours and so while you're having your new filler put in your reversing agent is taking it back out again so that is the biggest issue here and the rest of it is kind of social media attention grabbing tape stuff that has a lovely visual story about what you might be able to do with fella that probably isn't true the biggest thing about all of this is I think it's driven by this competition that people feel they need to compete with the latest news Trend if you actually want to find out how to compete if you're a medical practitioner and you want to find out how to compete without doing this sort of thing to your patients then click on the link that goes with this or have a look in the link in my bio and I'm doing a free webinar just for medical practitioners where I'm going to explaining just how you should compete in this crazy Marketplace that we have in Medical Aesthetics the right way to get you quality patient to stay with you for many years so click on the link in my bio and I'll see you there
